findings.title: Unsanitized session_id in manual session read
findings.description: get_session constructs path with session_id without rejection of .. or path separators. Can read files outside project tree.
findings.recommendation: Strict regex on session_id or resolve+relative_to check.

findings.title: Analysis endpoint accepts arbitrary filesystem paths and URLs
findings.description: analysis.py passes body.inputs to parse() which reads local files and fetches HTTP URLs with no restriction to project input_dir.
findings.recommendation: Resolve paths under project input_dir; allowlist remote URL fetching.

findings.title: Input upload: no size limit, weak type guarantees
findings.description: upload_input uses await file.read() with no max size. No extension allowlist or magic-byte validation.
findings.recommendation: Enforce max upload size, allowlist extensions, optionally verify MIME.

findings.title: Remote code execution when API is exposed
findings.description: execution.run_tests executes project scripts; scripts writable via PUT. No authentication.
findings.recommendation: Bind localhost only, add authentication, sandbox execution.

findings.title: Project scan directory not constrained
findings.description: list_projects uses Path(directory) from query parameter without traversal policy.
findings.recommendation: Resolve against allowlisted base, reject .. in parts.

findings.title: simpleMarkdown image syntax injects unescaped alt
findings.description: Markdown images use alt text directly in alt attribute without esc().
findings.recommendation: Escape alt for HTML attribute context.

findings.title: safeHref allows protocol-relative URLs
findings.description: safeHref permits hrefs starting with / so //evil.example passes through.
findings.recommendation: Allowlist only http: and https: with optional same-origin paths.

findings.title: API responses expose full filesystem paths
findings.description: Multiple endpoints return str(project_dir) or absolute paths.
findings.recommendation: Return opaque IDs or relative paths.

findings.title: detailField second argument is raw HTML
findings.description: detailField concatenates value into HTML without escaping. Current sites mostly use esc() but misuse would cause XSS.

findings.title: No CSP or static resource hardening
findings.description: Static shell loads scripts with no Content-Security-Policy.
findings.recommendation: Add restrictive CSP for self-hosted static assets.

overall_impression: Useful filename sanitization and esc() usage, but manual session path traversal, unconstrained uploads, SSRF via analysis inputs, and no auth are significant gaps. Default localhost binding mitigates but doesn't fix.
